calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Resignation, Appointing Successor Trustee And Approval Of Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Jan-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stacie Nelson for Mechanics Bank. James Clementi appeared by telephone for Private Trust Company ("PTC").

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions and stated that the term corporation was used to distinguish the difference between an entity and an individual. Mr. Clemente explained that PTC was wholey owned by PTC Holdings, Inc. which was owned by LPL Holdings, Inc. ("LPL"), stated that it was a chartered entity and referred to the regulatory agreement. The Court will allow Mr. Clemente to submit a copy of the regulatory agreement attached to a declaration from an Officer auhtenticating it as it relates to LPL and PTC in a sealed envelope marked confidential addressed to Judge Ballati for in camera review. The document will not be made public. The matter was taken under submission.

Mr. Clemente's contact information is:

James Clementi
9785 Town Center Drive
San Diego, CA 92121 Phone number: (800)-877-7210 ext. 7289
e-mail address: jim.clementi@lpl.com

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.
